Robot Carers:
The Future of Care

Watch the video, then complete four interactive exercises on vocabulary, future forms, comprehension and speaking.

Vocabulary match

Click a term, then its matching definition. All eight must be matched correctly.

2

Future tense focus

Choose the most natural future form. Think about whether each situation is a prediction, a plan, a fixed arrangement, or a completed future action.

Comprehension challenge

Select the best answer for each question based on the video, then click Check answers.

Speaking challenge

Prepare a 60–90 second spoken answer for each question. Paste a short transcript or notes, then click Get AI speaking feedback for C1-level comments.

This page uses OpenAI's Responses API from the browser. For classroom/public use, route requests through your own server so your key is not exposed to students.
Speaking criteria: task response, fluency, organisation, C1 vocabulary, grammar range, pronunciation notes you can practise, and a stronger model answer.
